caption: A presentation slide with a textured orange-red background features a gold decorative line near the top. In the initial stages, the header reads "METHODS" and lists four bullet points: "Contract", "Inquiry", "Attunement", and "Invovement". This slide remains static through the first three frames. In the final frame, the content changes; the header shifts to "THERAPY FOCUS", and the bulleted list is replaced with new text: "Script core decisions made in past", "Look for Past-Present Enactments", "Increase Awareness", "New decisions", and "Anchor in Present- Intgration". No people, objects, or logos are visible, and the setting is limited to the digital presentation screen.
